items.name: Chatpat
items.description: A spicy mix of puffed rice, veggies, and tangy sauces — crunchy and flavorful.

items.name: Laphing
items.description: Cold, spicy noodle rolls made from plain flour starch, topped with garlic, soy sauce, and chili — Tibetan-inspired.

items.name: Sausage (3pc)
items.description: Spicy or mild sausage, perfect as a snack or side.

items.name: Choila
items.description: Traditional Newari-style spicy grilled meat, marinated with mustard oil, garlic, and spices.

items.name: Samosa (2pc)
items.description: Crispy pastry filled with spiced potatoes.

items.name: Fried Momo
items.description: Deep-fried momo with crispy outer layer and juicy filling.

items.name: Steam Momo
items.description: Soft and juicy dumplings, freshly steamed.

items.name: Jhol Momo
items.description: Steamed momos served in a spicy, tangy sesame-tomato soup.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Stir-fried noodles infused with authentic Nepali sauce and spices, mixed with veggies.

items.name: Bara (2pc)
items.description: Savory lentil pancake, crispy on the outside, soft inside — a popular Newari dish.

items.name: Egg Bara
items.description: Lentil pancake topped with egg — rich and filling.

items.name: Samosa Chat
items.description: Crushed samosa topped with chickpeas, yogurt, and chutneys.

items.name: Masala Tea
items.description: Hot Nepali-style spiced milk tea, infused with cardamom, ginger, and other spices.
